modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble sharing Google Sites with others.

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to share my Google Sites but it’s not working. I don’t know how to do it, and I can’t find the right options. It’s really confusing, and I need help to figure out how to share it with my team.
short_description: Trouble sharing Google Sites with others.
description: I’m trying to share my Google Sites but it’s not working. I don’t know how to do it, and I can’t find the right options. It’s really confusing, and I need help to figure out how to share it with my team.
